company.name: Aria Studio
company.vertical: a solo performance: one human, an ensemble of agents, real footage, real invoices

orders.title: 5s brand film: the one-person company era
orders.brief: Accelerator wants a stinger for the OPC movement. Audience: builders and VCs. Feel: one person at a desk commanding a fleet of unseen forces, city lights, quiet power. Photorealistic, cinematic. End on the silhouette and the skyline.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Quiet Command","hook":"A lone founder sits at a desk as invisible momentum seems to answer every subtle movement, instantly signaling control without spectacle.","beats":["Close on hands at a minimalist desk, one tap sends unseen activity into motion.","Camera pulls back to reveal the founder still and centered, city lights blooming beyond the window.","End on the silhouette against the skyline, calm and absolute."],"style":"Photorealistic, cinematic, restrained, dusk-lit, premium, silent power, urban, minimal","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic shot in a modern high-rise office at dusk. Start in an intimate close-up on a lone founderâs hands at a clean desk, then slowly dolly backward and rise, revealing subtle signs of unseen forces at work through phone glow, shifting reflections, and softly animated city light beyond the glass. Keep the mood quiet, premium, and controlled, with natural interior lighting and cool skyline ambience. End with the founder as a dark silhouette framed against the illuminated city horizon."}

concept.hook: A lone founder sits at a desk as invisible momentum seems to answer every subtle movement, instantly signaling control without spectacle.
beats: Close on hands at a minimalist desk, one tap sends unseen activity into motion.
Camera pulls back to reveal the founder still and centered, city lights blooming beyond the window.
End on the silhouette against the skyline, calm and absolute.
concept.style: Photorealistic, cinematic, restrained, dusk-lit, premium, silent power, urban, minimal
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic shot in a modern high-rise office at dusk. Start in an intimate close-up on a lone founderâs hands at a clean desk, then slowly dolly backward and rise, revealing subtle signs of unseen forces at work through phone glow, shifting reflections, and softly animated city light beyond the glass. Keep the mood quiet, premium, and controlled, with natural interior lighting and cool skyline ambience. End with the founder as a dark silhouette framed against the illuminated city horizon.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Quiet Command","hook":"A lone founder at a desk snaps a hand forward as unseen workflows ignite around them, instantly implying a one-person company commanding a fleet.","beats":["Close on a single hand over a clean desk as screens glow and city reflections breathe to life.","Subtle motion suggests invisible operators at workâfiles moving, lights shifting, tasks resolving offscreen.","Camera rises behind the founder into a strong silhouette framed by the skyline, ending on quiet power."],"style":"cinematic realism, nocturnal city glow, restrained motion, founder-led authority","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a modern high-rise office at blue hour: a lone founder sits at a sparse desk, then makes a small decisive hand movement as unseen forces seem to activate around them through subtle light changes, screen reflections, and ambient office motion without showing any text or UI. The camera slowly dollies from close desk-level to behind the subject, revealing the city skyline through floor-to-ceiling glass. Moody, quiet, powerful, premium commercial lighting, real materials, ending on the founderâs silhouette against the glowing skyline."}

concept.hook: A lone founder at a desk snaps a hand forward as unseen workflows ignite around them, instantly implying a one-person company commanding a fleet.
beats: Close on a single hand over a clean desk as screens glow and city reflections breathe to life.
Subtle motion suggests invisible operators at workâfiles moving, lights shifting, tasks resolving offscreen.
Camera rises behind the founder into a strong silhouette framed by the skyline, ending on quiet power.
concept.style: cinematic realism, nocturnal city glow, restrained motion, founder-led authority
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a modern high-rise office at blue hour: a lone founder sits at a sparse desk, then makes a small decisive hand movement as unseen forces seem to activate around them through subtle light changes, screen reflections, and ambient office motion without showing any text or UI. The camera slowly dollies from close desk-level to behind the subject, revealing the city skyline through floor-to-ceiling glass. Moody, quiet, powerful, premium commercial lighting, real materials, ending on the founderâs silhouette against the glowing skyline.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Solo Command","hook":"A lone founder at a dark desk makes a subtle hand movement, and the city beyond seems to answer.","beats":["Close, quiet desk setup with one focused person lit by monitor glow.","Invisible waves of activity ripple outward through reflected city lights and moving shadows.","Final frame holds on the personâs silhouette against the skyline, calm and commanding."],"style":"Photoreal cinematic, restrained motion, nocturnal power, soft contrast, crisp city glow","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical 9:16 shot in a modern high-rise office at night. A single founder sits alone at a minimalist desk, seen in profile, with only a laptop glow and soft desk lamp light shaping the face and hands. The camera slowly pushes in from behind and slightly to the side as the person makes a small, confident hand movement over the desk. Outside the window, the city lights shimmer and subtle reflections suggest unseen activity answering the gesture. Quiet, powerful, cinematic, ending on the personâs silhouette framed against the skyline."}

concept.hook: A lone founder at a dark desk makes a subtle hand movement, and the city beyond seems to answer.
beats: Close, quiet desk setup with one focused person lit by monitor glow.
Invisible waves of activity ripple outward through reflected city lights and moving shadows.
Final frame holds on the personâs silhouette against the skyline, calm and commanding.
concept.style: Photoreal cinematic, restrained motion, nocturnal power, soft contrast, crisp city glow
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical 9:16 shot in a modern high-rise office at night. A single founder sits alone at a minimalist desk, seen in profile, with only a laptop glow and soft desk lamp light shaping the face and hands. The camera slowly pushes in from behind and slightly to the side as the person makes a small, confident hand movement over the desk. Outside the window, the city lights shimmer and subtle reflections suggest unseen activity answering the gesture. Quiet, powerful, cinematic, ending on the personâs silhouette framed against the skyline.

duels.reason: Decisive hand gesture triggering unseen forces more vividly literalizes 'commanding a fleet' for the brief.
Decisive hand-snap ignition gives sharper instant hook and more thumb-stopping energy than A's subtler tap.
Clearer camera logic and specified aspect ratio make it more feasible as a deliverable single shot.
Rising camera reveal into skyline silhouette creates stronger escalating hook than static profile push-in.
Vertical format suits stinger placement, tighter cinematography and clearer cause-effect gesture strengthen brand message.
B specifies vertical 9:16 framing and a push-in gesture, delivering stronger thumb-stopping energy muted.

orders.title: 5s explainer hook: how lightning forms
orders.brief: Science channel needs a cold-open hook for a lightning episode. Audience: curious 16-30, sound off. Feel: awe plus one clear visual idea (charge building, then release). Photorealistic storm craft, not cartoon. End on the strike.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Charge Snap","hook":"A dark storm cloud fills the frame as tiny ice particles visibly jitter and collide, then a sudden white branch of lightning tears downward.","beats":["Macro turbulence inside the cloud shows particles colliding and separating charge.","The cloud edge brightens as tension builds, with a thin crack of light forming.","Lightning erupts in a single violent strike and holds as the hero shot."],"style":"photoreal storm macro, cold contrast, restrained motion, high detail","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot inside a massive thundercloud at dusk, filmed like a premium nature commercial. Start with an immediate close view of dense gray ice particles and mist swirling in turbulent air, illuminated by cold blue ambient light. Use a slow push-in as the particles collide and the cloud interior subtly builds brighter electric tension. Without cuts, the frame intensifies and a sharp branching lightning strike erupts downward in a blinding white flash, ending on the strike as the hero image. No text, no logos, no UI, no watermarks."}

concept.hook: A dark storm cloud fills the frame as tiny ice particles visibly jitter and collide, then a sudden white branch of lightning tears downward.
beats: Macro turbulence inside the cloud shows particles colliding and separating charge.
The cloud edge brightens as tension builds, with a thin crack of light forming.
Lightning erupts in a single violent strike and holds as the hero shot.
concept.style: photoreal storm macro, cold contrast, restrained motion, high detail
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot inside a massive thundercloud at dusk, filmed like a premium nature commercial. Start with an immediate close view of dense gray ice particles and mist swirling in turbulent air, illuminated by cold blue ambient light. Use a slow push-in as the particles collide and the cloud interior subtly builds brighter electric tension. Without cuts, the frame intensifies and a sharp branching lightning strike erupts downward in a blinding white flash, ending on the strike as the hero image. No text, no logos, no UI, no watermarks.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Charge Burst","hook":"A dark storm cloud suddenly flashes from within as invisible charge snaps into a bright lightning strike, stopping the scroll with a single explosive release.","beats":["Cold blue storm clouds churn overhead as tiny ice particles collide inside the cloud","A subtle build of electric tension glows through the cloud as the charge separates","The stored energy erupts into one clean lightning strike, ending on the bolt impact"],"style":"photoreal storm realism, cold blue tones, tense buildup, explosive release, cinematic","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic shot in a vertical frame over a wide open landscape at dusk, dark thunderclouds rolling overhead. The camera begins low and steady, then slowly tilts up as wind pushes rain and mist across the scene. Inside the cloud, faint blue-white flashes build subtly, suggesting electrical charge separation. The tension peaks and a single brilliant lightning bolt tears downward, illuminating the sky and horizon. Cinematic, natural storm light, awe-filled, no text, no logos, no watermarks."}

concept.hook: A dark storm cloud suddenly flashes from within as invisible charge snaps into a bright lightning strike, stopping the scroll with a single explosive release.
beats: Cold blue storm clouds churn overhead as tiny ice particles collide inside the cloud
A subtle build of electric tension glows through the cloud as the charge separates
The stored energy erupts into one clean lightning strike, ending on the bolt impact
concept.style: photoreal storm realism, cold blue tones, tense buildup, explosive release, cinematic
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic shot in a vertical frame over a wide open landscape at dusk, dark thunderclouds rolling overhead. The camera begins low and steady, then slowly tilts up as wind pushes rain and mist across the scene. Inside the cloud, faint blue-white flashes build subtly, suggesting electrical charge separation. The tension peaks and a single brilliant lightning bolt tears downward, illuminating the sky and horizon. Cinematic, natural storm light, awe-filled, no text, no logos, no watermarks.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Charge Snap","hook":"A dark storm cloud fills the frame as tiny blue sparks crawl through its belly, then the whole sky suddenly rips open in one blinding strike.","beats":["Ice and water droplets churn inside the cloud, separating electric charge.","Blue corona flickers along the cloud edge as the field intensifies.","A single lightning bolt flashes to the ground, ending on the strike."],"style":"photoreal storm macro, tense buildup, sudden white-hot release","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot inside a towering thundercloud at dusk, starting in extreme close-up on roiling ice crystals and water droplets colliding in slow motion. Tiny blue electrical filaments begin crawling between particles as the camera gently pushes forward through the dense storm mass. The light grows darker and more charged, with a subtle vibrating glow building in the cloud. Suddenly, a brilliant lightning bolt detonates through the frame and down to the ground, freezing the scene in a powerful hero strike, cinematic and awe-filled, with realistic storm lighting and no text or logos."}

concept.hook: A dark storm cloud fills the frame as tiny blue sparks crawl through its belly, then the whole sky suddenly rips open in one blinding strike.
beats: Ice and water droplets churn inside the cloud, separating electric charge.
Blue corona flickers along the cloud edge as the field intensifies.
A single lightning bolt flashes to the ground, ending on the strike.
concept.style: photoreal storm macro, tense buildup, sudden white-hot release
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot inside a towering thundercloud at dusk, starting in extreme close-up on roiling ice crystals and water droplets colliding in slow motion. Tiny blue electrical filaments begin crawling between particles as the camera gently pushes forward through the dense storm mass. The light grows darker and more charged, with a subtle vibrating glow building in the cloud. Suddenly, a brilliant lightning bolt detonates through the frame and down to the ground, freezing the scene in a powerful hero strike, cinematic and awe-filled, with realistic storm lighting and no text or logos.

duels.reason: Wider landscape framing with visible ground/horizon reads clearer as a storm hook than pure cloud macro.
Immediate macro particle jitter fills frame instantly, tighter continuous push-in beats B's slower wide tilt-up setup.
Macro charge-crawl visual is more distinct and feasible, clearly showing buildup-to-release physics client wants.
Macro close-up on crawling charge is a novel first-half-second hook versus A's generic wide storm shot.
Visible blue charge filaments make the buildup mechanism clearer and more awe-inducing before the strike.
Crawling blue sparks add extra visual novelty before the strike, boosting muted thumb-stop energy.

orders.title: 5s destination teaser: island lagoon
orders.brief: Tourism board wants a scroll-stopper for the lagoon season. Audience: SEA city dwellers planning long weekends. Feel: the second you decide to book, turquoise water, limestone cliffs, one human moment. End wide on the lagoon.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Lagoon Rush","hook":"A hand parts the water in the foreground, revealing sudden turquoise clarity under towering limestone cliffs.","beats":["A quick glide over glassy lagoon water between sheer limestone walls.","One traveler in a small kayak lifts a hand to the water, creating a luminous ripple.","The camera pulls wide to reveal the full hidden lagoon, calm and expansive."],"style":"Premium tropical realism, crisp water, majestic cliffs, intimate human scale.","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a hidden tropical lagoon at golden hour. Start extremely close on a hand skimming clear turquoise water, then the camera glides forward past a small kayak with one relaxed traveler before rising into a wide reveal of towering limestone cliffs surrounding the lagoon. Real sunlight, natural reflections, detailed water texture, serene premium travel mood, smooth cinematic movement, fast enough to hook instantly, ending on a wide hero view of the lagoon. No on-screen text, no logos, no watermarks."}

concept.hook: A hand parts the water in the foreground, revealing sudden turquoise clarity under towering limestone cliffs.
beats: A quick glide over glassy lagoon water between sheer limestone walls.
One traveler in a small kayak lifts a hand to the water, creating a luminous ripple.
The camera pulls wide to reveal the full hidden lagoon, calm and expansive.
concept.style: Premium tropical realism, crisp water, majestic cliffs, intimate human scale.
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a hidden tropical lagoon at golden hour. Start extremely close on a hand skimming clear turquoise water, then the camera glides forward past a small kayak with one relaxed traveler before rising into a wide reveal of towering limestone cliffs surrounding the lagoon. Real sunlight, natural reflections, detailed water texture, serene premium travel mood, smooth cinematic movement, fast enough to hook instantly, ending on a wide hero view of the lagoon. No on-screen text, no logos, no watermarks.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Lagoon Breath","hook":"A skiff bursts into frame and reveals impossible turquoise water framed by limestone walls in the first half second.","beats":["Skiff cuts across glassy lagoon at speed, wake flashing white against cyan water.","A single traveler steps to the bow and reaches toward the water, catching a splash in sunlight.","Camera rises into a wide hero reveal of the full lagoon, cliffs towering around the still turquoise bay."],"style":"Golden-hour realism, crisp turquoise water, towering limestone, intimate human scale.","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a tropical limestone lagoon at golden hour: start with a tight, fast-moving perspective from a small skiff as it bursts into luminous turquoise water, camera low to the surface, then smoothly dolly past the boatâs edge to reveal a lone traveler standing at the bow, hand trailing through the water in a brief human moment. Keep motion fluid and cinematic, with sunlit cliffs rising around the lagoon. End by pulling back and rising into a wide hero view of the entire bay, calm water, towering limestone walls, warm natural light, no text, no logos."}

concept.hook: A skiff bursts into frame and reveals impossible turquoise water framed by limestone walls in the first half second.
beats: Skiff cuts across glassy lagoon at speed, wake flashing white against cyan water.
A single traveler steps to the bow and reaches toward the water, catching a splash in sunlight.
Camera rises into a wide hero reveal of the full lagoon, cliffs towering around the still turquoise bay.
concept.style: Golden-hour realism, crisp turquoise water, towering limestone, intimate human scale.
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a tropical limestone lagoon at golden hour: start with a tight, fast-moving perspective from a small skiff as it bursts into luminous turquoise water, camera low to the surface, then smoothly dolly past the boatâs edge to reveal a lone traveler standing at the bow, hand trailing through the water in a brief human moment. Keep motion fluid and cinematic, with sunlit cliffs rising around the lagoon. End by pulling back and rising into a wide hero view of the entire bay, calm water, towering limestone walls, warm natural light, no text, no logos.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Lagoon Leap","hook":"A city traveler bursts from a narrow limestone opening into blinding turquoise water, instantly revealing the lagoon beyond.","beats":["Close on wet hands pushing through a dark rock slit into daylight","A single breathless human moment: one swimmer pauses, awestruck, in the calm water","Camera pulls wide to reveal the full lagoon framed by towering limestone cliffs"],"style":"Photoreal tropical escape, crisp sunlight, natural water motion, cinematic wide reveal","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a tropical limestone lagoon: start inches behind a young Southeast Asian traveler squeezing through a narrow dark rock passage, wet hands brushing stone, then burst into bright daylight over vivid turquoise water. The camera smoothly follows as the traveler floats for a beat, looking up in silent awe, while sunlight shimmers on the surface and steep limestone cliffs rise around the cove. Keep pacing fast but elegant, realistic natural light, soft wind, no text, no logos, end in a wide hero reveal of the full lagoon."}

concept.hook: A city traveler bursts from a narrow limestone opening into blinding turquoise water, instantly revealing the lagoon beyond.
beats: Close on wet hands pushing through a dark rock slit into daylight
A single breathless human moment: one swimmer pauses, awestruck, in the calm water
Camera pulls wide to reveal the full lagoon framed by towering limestone cliffs
concept.style: Photoreal tropical escape, crisp sunlight, natural water motion, cinematic wide reveal
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a tropical limestone lagoon: start inches behind a young Southeast Asian traveler squeezing through a narrow dark rock passage, wet hands brushing stone, then burst into bright daylight over vivid turquoise water. The camera smoothly follows as the traveler floats for a beat, looking up in silent awe, while sunlight shimmers on the surface and steep limestone cliffs rise around the cove. Keep pacing fast but elegant, realistic natural light, soft wind, no text, no logos, end in a wide hero reveal of the full lagoon.

duels.reason: Faster kinetic hook and clearer speed-to-calm arc better match scroll-stopper brief within 5 seconds.
A bursting skiff and flashing wake hooks harder than a static hand-parting-water opener.
Emotional discovery arc and darkness-to-turquoise reveal feels more scroll-stopping and on-brand than a generic skiff shot.
Dark-to-light rock burst is a sharper contrast hook than a boat, stopping thumbs faster.
B's dark-to-bright reveal and traveler's awe more viscerally match 'the second you decide to book.'
Dark-to-light burst through rock creates instant visual shock, stronger muted-feed hook than a hand ripple.

orders.title: 5s vertical bumper: cold brew can launch
orders.brief: Singapore cold brew brand launching a matte black can. Audience: 20-35 office crowd doomscrolling at 3pm. Feel: the exact moment cold caffeine hits. Premium but not corporate. End on the can.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Black Surge","hook":"A matte black can snaps cold from the ice chest, and the afternoon slump disappears.","beats":["Office desk at 3pm, hand reaches in from frame edge.","Can hits the desk, frost beads and condensation bloom.","Final hero hold on the matte black can, perfectly lit."],"style":"premium minimal, icy tactile, kinetic macro, office realism, crisp shadows","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a modern Singapore office at 3pm, a tired hand slides a matte black cold brew can from a chilled desk drawer onto a clean dark surface. The camera starts tight on condensation and ice-cold frost, then subtly tracks and pushes in as the can lands with a satisfying thunk, tiny water droplets racing down the matte finish. Cool daylight mixes with soft overhead office light, creating premium contrast and realism. Pace is brisk, tactile, and ends in a steady hero shot of the can, centered and pristine."}

concept.hook: A matte black can snaps cold from the ice chest, and the afternoon slump disappears.
beats: Office desk at 3pm, hand reaches in from frame edge.
Can hits the desk, frost beads and condensation bloom.
Final hero hold on the matte black can, perfectly lit.
concept.style: premium minimal, icy tactile, kinetic macro, office realism, crisp shadows
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a modern Singapore office at 3pm, a tired hand slides a matte black cold brew can from a chilled desk drawer onto a clean dark surface. The camera starts tight on condensation and ice-cold frost, then subtly tracks and pushes in as the can lands with a satisfying thunk, tiny water droplets racing down the matte finish. Cool daylight mixes with soft overhead office light, creating premium contrast and realism. Pace is brisk, tactile, and ends in a steady hero shot of the can, centered and pristine.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Black Hit","hook":"A drained office hand reaches for the matte black can, cracks it open, and the first burst of cold caffeine snaps the whole scene awake in half a second.","beats":["3pm desk slump, muted office light, hand slides the matte black can into frame","sharp crack open, condensation flares, a crisp rush of cold vapor hits","energy returns in a focused beat, ending on the can hero shot in hand"],"style":"Premium realism, office fatigue, crisp condensation, restrained motion, cinematic light","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a modern Singapore office at 3pm, shallow depth of field, a tired young professional at a desk surrounded by laptop, papers, and soft window light. The camera starts tight on a matte black cold brew can with condensation, then slowly pushes in as a hand grips and cracks it open. A visible cold vapor burst and subtle reaction of relief and focus follows. Keep motion smooth, premium, and natural, ending with the can held heroically in frame, lit by warm afternoon light. No text, no logos, no watermarks."}

concept.hook: A drained office hand reaches for the matte black can, cracks it open, and the first burst of cold caffeine snaps the whole scene awake in half a second.
beats: 3pm desk slump, muted office light, hand slides the matte black can into frame
sharp crack open, condensation flares, a crisp rush of cold vapor hits
energy returns in a focused beat, ending on the can hero shot in hand
concept.style: Premium realism, office fatigue, crisp condensation, restrained motion, cinematic light
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a modern Singapore office at 3pm, shallow depth of field, a tired young professional at a desk surrounded by laptop, papers, and soft window light. The camera starts tight on a matte black cold brew can with condensation, then slowly pushes in as a hand grips and cracks it open. A visible cold vapor burst and subtle reaction of relief and focus follows. Keep motion smooth, premium, and natural, ending with the can held heroically in frame, lit by warm afternoon light. No text, no logos, no watermarks.

drafts.content: {"concept":"Cold Snap","hook":"A chilled black can slams onto a sunlit desk and instantly sweats, making the afternoon air feel cooler in half a second.","beats":["Condensation beads race across the matte black can as it lands beside a laptop and phone on a modern office desk.","A crisp burst of cold vapor rolls low across the surface, hinting at that first caffeine hit.","The camera settles into a clean hero close-up on the can, gleaming with icy droplets."],"style":"Photoreal office desk, cold vapor, premium macro light, crisp kinetic realism","video_prompt":"One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a modern Singapore office desk setting at 3pm, no people visible, no text or logos. Start on a matte black cold brew can dropping into frame and landing with a subtle impact on a clean desk beside a laptop and phone. The can instantly beads with condensation as cold vapor curls across the surface. Use a low macro camera push-in with shallow depth of field, bright natural window light mixed with cool highlights, premium commercial realism, fast but elegant pacing. End locked on the can hero shot."}

concept.hook: A chilled black can slams onto a sunlit desk and instantly sweats, making the afternoon air feel cooler in half a second.
beats: Condensation beads race across the matte black can as it lands beside a laptop and phone on a modern office desk.
A crisp burst of cold vapor rolls low across the surface, hinting at that first caffeine hit.
The camera settles into a clean hero close-up on the can, gleaming with icy droplets.
concept.style: Photoreal office desk, cold vapor, premium macro light, crisp kinetic realism
concept.video_prompt: One continuous photorealistic vertical shot in a modern Singapore office desk setting at 3pm, no people visible, no text or logos. Start on a matte black cold brew can dropping into frame and landing with a subtle impact on a clean desk beside a laptop and phone. The can instantly beads with condensation as cold vapor curls across the surface. Use a low macro camera push-in with shallow depth of field, bright natural window light mixed with cool highlights, premium commercial realism, fast but elegant pacing. End locked on the can hero shot.

duels.reason: Simpler single-shot action, cleaner can-only hero end, less risky as one continuous AI generation.
Crack-open vapor burst is a sharper half-second hook than a slower can-slide reveal.
No-people macro approach is more reliably generatable in 5s and stays cleanly on-brand ending on the can.
Can-slam impact with instant condensation is a punchier zero-frame hook than a slow desk reach.
No-people/no-text specs and vapor-caffeine cue make B a safer, cleaner single-shot client sign-off.
Vapor burst plus no-hand can-drop reads faster and colder in the first frame, sharper hook.

state.playbook:
1. First frame hooks in half a second. No slow fades, no logo intros.
2. One idea per spot. If the concept needs a sentence of explanation, kill it.
3. Native vertical 9:16, designed for sound-off viewing.
4. Photorealistic commercial craft: real light, real materials, believable people. No neon gimmicks unless the brief asks.
5. Never render on-screen text, UI, logos or celebrity likeness.
6. End on the subject hero shot. Recall beats cleverness.

agents.name: HALE
agents.style: benefit-led product commercials: studio-grade macro shots, controlled lighting, satisfying physical detail (pour, crack, texture), premium minimalism in the Apple and Nike tradition

agents.name: WANDER
agents.style: warm documentary realism: golden hour, drone establishing moves, human moments in real places, National Geographic meets tourism-board campaign

agents.name: SAGE
agents.style: science and how-it-works visuals: macro and slow-motion physical phenomena, clean visual metaphors, crisp educational pacing in the Kurzgesagt and BBC Earth tradition, photorealistic not cartoon

templates.title: 5s vertical bumper: cold brew can launch
templates.brief: Singapore cold brew brand launching a matte black can. Audience: 20-35 office crowd doomscrolling at 3pm. Feel: the exact moment cold caffeine hits. Premium but not corporate. End on the can.

templates.title: 5s destination teaser: island lagoon
templates.brief: Tourism board wants a scroll-stopper for the lagoon season. Audience: SEA city dwellers planning long weekends. Feel: the second you decide to book, turquoise water, limestone cliffs, one human moment. End wide on the lagoon.

templates.title: 5s explainer hook: how lightning forms
templates.brief: Science channel needs a cold-open hook for a lightning episode. Audience: curious 16-30, sound off. Feel: awe plus one clear visual idea (charge building, then release). Photorealistic storm craft, not cartoon. End on the strike.
